scenario.name: Kabir
scenario.key_situation: Very urgent timeline but serious budget constraint — edge case

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Namaste Kabir! Main Priya bol rahi hoon PhysicsWallah se. Aapne humare courses ke baare mein inquiry ki thi. Kaise hain aap?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan namaste. Main theek hoon. Actually mujhe JEE Advanced ki preparation ke liye course chahiye tha.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! JEE Advanced ke liye hum definitely help kar sakte hain. Aap currently class 12th mein hain na? Aur exam kab hai aapka?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan class 12th mein hoon. JEE Advanced May mein hai, matlab sirf 6 months bache hain. Bohot tension ho rahi hai.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: 6 months sufficient time hai agar proper strategy se padhen. Kabir, aapne JEE Main qualify kar liya hai already? Aur current preparation level kaisa hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Main ne mock test diya tha JEE Main ka, around 85 percentile aa raha hai. But Advanced bilkul different hai na. Physics aur Chemistry weak hai meri.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: 85 percentile means aap ka base strong hai! Physics Chemistry ko improve karna hai toh targeted approach lena hoga. Aap koi coaching attend kar rahe hain currently?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Local coaching thi but teacher bohot boring hain. Online shift karna chahta hoon. But bhaiya, budget ka issue hai. Papa ki job thodi si problem mein hai요즘.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Main samajh sakti hoon Kabir. Budget constraints hain toh hum options dekh sakte hain. Aap monthly kitna invest kar sakte hain realistically?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Dekho honestly bolu toh maximum 2-3 thousand per month. Zyada nahi ho payega. But mujhe lagta hai PW courses expensive honge.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Aap bilkul galat soch rahe hain! Humara JEE Advanced batch sirf 3999 mein complete course hai. One time payment. Monthly breakdown karo toh 700 rupees per month.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Kya? Itna kam mein? Seriously? Koi hidden charges toh nahi hain? Offline coaching toh 50-60 thousand maang rahi thi.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul no hidden charges! Humara mission hi affordable education hai. 3999 mein complete JEE Advanced course, live classes, recorded lectures, test series, doubt solving - sab kuch included.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yaar ye toh bohot accha hai. But main worry kar raha hoon ki online mein interaction kaisa hoga? Main bohot doubts karta hoon usually.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul valid concern hai. Humari live classes mein real-time doubt solving hoti hai. Plus dedicated doubt sessions hain. Teachers bohot accessible hain, Alakh sir ka approach dekha hai aapne?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan YouTube pe dekha hai. Samjhaate bohot accha hain. But yaar 6 months mein syllabus complete ho jayega na? Main bohot late start kar raha hoon.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Dekho Kabir, honestly bolu toh 6 months tight hai but impossible nahi. Aap ka 85 percentile means foundation ready hai. Humara crash course specifically aise students ke liye hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm... crash course matlab? Regular course se different hai kya? Main chahta hoon ki properly cover ho jaaye sab topics.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: JEE Advanced Yakeen batch hai jo main recommend kar rahi hoon. Ye 6 months ka intensive program hai with focus on high-yield topics aur previous year patterns. Complete coverage hoga.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Acha... but yaar honestly bolu? 4000 bhi abhi difficult lag raha hai ek saath dena. Koi EMI option hai kya?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Samajh raha hoon. EMI facility available hai, 2 installments mein kar sakte hain. 2000 now, 2000 after one month. Aur scholarship test bhi de sakte hain additional discount ke liye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Scholarship test? Kya hai ye? Kitna discount mil sakta hai isme?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: PWSAT test hai - online test dena hoga. Score ke basis pe 10-30% discount mil sakta hai. Aap ka level dekh ke lagta hai qualify ho jayenge easily.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yaar ye toh perfect hai! Test kab de sakta hoon? Aur results kab aayenge? Time waste toh nahi hoga na?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Test weekend mein de sakte hain, results 2-3 days mein aa jaate hain. But Kabir, honestly bolu toh time factor consider karte hue jaldi decision lena chahiye. Batch already start ho chuka hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Oh! Matlab main already behind hoon? Yaar ye problem hai. Catch up kar paunga na? Recorded lectures available hain missed classes ke liye?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan bilkul! Saare previous lectures recorded available hain app mein. Plus catch-up plan bhi provide karte hain. 1-2 weeks mein current batch ke saath sync ho jayenge.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Theek hai bhaiya. Main scholarship test dena chahta hoon pehle. Uske baad decide karunga. Test book kaise karu?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Main aapko test link share kar deti hoon. WhatsApp number de dijiye, saari details send kar dungi. Test ke baad direct mujhse contact kar lena results ke liye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan sure. 9876543210 ye mera number hai. Test ke baad aapko call kar lunga. Thank you bohot help ki aapne!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Most welcome Kabir! Test link abhi send kar rahi hoon. All the best! Aur koi doubt ho toh feel free to call. Humara support team bhi 24/7 available hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect! Thanks again Priya. Main test de ke aapko update karunga. JEE Advanced clear karna hai bas ab!
